title: Salt Flats Repeats
description:
ALL

AMRAP:

65' Beep Test

*Tie breaker: Before the beep test, their will be a one time shuttle sprint down and back timed to the 10th of a second. The clock on this will be 2 mins.

The beep test will begin its first beep at the end of the 2 mins and the new 15 min cap will begin.
